goal: Build an RL training scaffold: 64 parallel Franka-reach envs cloned via clone_envs. Launch RL-Games or RSL-RL. Realizes Phase 8 yrkesroll #2 (ML/RL persona). Sanity check: reward curve emitted after 60s.
thoughts: clone_envs creates a 64-instance grid of identical sub-stages. Each is a Franka + cube + bin.
create_isaaclab_env wraps the parallel envs into a Gym-compatible env spec.
launch_training kicks off PPO via RL-Games or RSL-RL backend.
Function-gate: training process logs reward; canonical SUCCESS = reward curve trends upward (mean reward delta > 0 over 60s).
Simplification: 64 envs may saturate GPU if asset isn't lightweight; fall back to 16 if needed.
Direct port from Isaac Lab Franka.Reach environment (RSL-RL recipe).
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": True, "broadphase_type": "GPU"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/EnvTemplate", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/EnvTemplate/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/EnvTemplate/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/EnvTemplate/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_prim(prim_path="/World/EnvTemplate/Cube", prim_type="Cube", position=[0.4, 0, 0.835], size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/EnvTemplate/Cube", schema_name=api)

create_bin(prim_path="/World/EnvTemplate/Bin", position=[-0.4, 0, 0.75], size=[0.20, 0.20, 0.10])

clone_envs(
    template_path="/World/EnvTemplate",
    n_envs=64,
    spacing=2.0,
    grid_layout="square",
)

create_isaaclab_env(
    env_name="FrankaReach-v0",
    template_path="/World/EnvTemplate",
    n_envs=64,
    obs_keys=["joint_pos", "joint_vel", "target_pos"],
    action_keys=["joint_targets"],
    reward_func="distance_to_target",
)

launch_training(
    env_name="FrankaReach-v0",
    backend="rsl_rl",
    algo="PPO",
    max_iterations=100,
    log_dir="/tmp/rl_clone_env_run",
)
extension_notes: ML/RL canonical. clone_envs + create_isaaclab_env are heavy-lift handlers; their functioning is what this canonical tests. Function-gate via simulate_traversal_check N/A (no single cube to deliver); custom validation via training-log reward trend.
failure_modes: clone_envs caps below 64 if VRAM exhausted
create_isaaclab_env may not exist or expects different signature
launch_training requires rsl_rl pip-installed; falls back if missing
GPU dynamics + 64 instances exceed RTX 5070 12GB VRAM — pre-flight via check_vram_headroom recommended
verified_status: draft (Phase 8 #2; needs rsl_rl/rl-games installed + VRAM check)
